title: Vehicle plunge into Knysna Lagoon, victim dies
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A man believed to be in his...
bodyText:
KNYSNA NEWS - A man believed to be in his early seventies has died after his vehicle plunged into the Knysna Lagoon on Monday, 22 December 2025.


> According to police spokesperson Warrant Officer Spies, Knysna police have opened an inquest docket following the incident, which occurred at approximately 14:00 on the N2 at the entrance to Knysna.


Reports indicate that emergency services were dispatched to the scene after a Ford Ranger left the roadway and entered the lagoon.

Read more online at sister publication, The Knysna-Plett Herald

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
